universe.description: 79-name universe: 75 top U.S. mega/large-cap stocks with full GICS sector coverage plus 4 commodity ETFs (gold, silver, oil, copper).

market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P -0.07%, Nasdaq -0.23%, Dow -0.13%. Financials led sectors (+0.75%) while Real Estate lagged (-0.98%). GPT-5.4 led the day at +3.00%. 6 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +17.69%. Key headline: Sen. Tillis prepared to end blockade of Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh - CNBC — headwind for risk assets.
